options.name: -category
options.description: Specifies the number of categories to be created for most occurring instances.

options.name: -incr_delay
options.description: Specifies that the categories are created based on worst incr_delay contribution or total incr_delay contribution.

options.name: -master
options.description: Specifies that the analysis should be performed only for the specified master category.

options.name: -max_slack
options.description: Specifies the max slack value of the critical paths for bottleneck analysis based on incr_delay.

options.name: -min_slack
options.description: Specifies the min slack value of the critical paths for bottleneck analysis based on incr_delay.

options.name: -path_num
options.description: Specifies the number of critical paths to be analyzed when performing bottleneck analysis based on incr_delay.
